comment.text: This key refers to billing-related functionality within the application. It appears in several places, including a link to navigate to billing settings, as a page title, and within a list of categories. Translators should consider it a general reference to managing payments or subscription details.

usage.context:
? t("ImportFromPortal", {
 organizationName: logoText,
 })
 : t("DataImport")
 : !standalone && isPaymentPage
 ? t("Billing")
 : t(header, {
 organizationName: logoText,
 license: t("Common:EnterpriseLicense"),
 productName: t("Common:ProductName"),
 aiServices: t("Common:AIServices"),

!isNotPaidPeriod &&
 isAdmin &&
 !isCommunity && {
 key: "user-menu-payments",
 icon: PaymentsReactSvgUrl,
 label: standalone ? t("Common:PaymentsTitle") : t("Common:Billing"),
 onClick: (obj) => this.onPaymentsClick(obj),
 additionalElement: <TariffBar />,
 url: PAYMENTS_URL,
 preventNewTab: true,
 },
